actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The organisers of the Wakestock music and wakeboarding festival have announced that the event will not take place in 2015.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police have discovered a large cannabis farm in Northern Ireland and arrested two people in connection with it.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been accused of killing another man and stealing his phone.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Chris Smalling denies that his recent knee injury will keep him from playing in the Euro 2016.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Slavisa Pantic is in talks to become the new manager of Reading FC.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Former Concacaf president Webb has been banned from all football-related activities for life.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: France has won the gold medal in the Men's Team épée event, giving them a total of 7 medals.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Brett Williams has rejoined Forest Green Rovers after a spell at Aldershot.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Coventry City's Thomas joins Rovers on a free transfer.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Blackburn Rovers sign midfielder Keith Andrews after he was released by Bolton.
